title: dot.ink Intent Receipt
description: Signed receipt returned by POST /v1/intent. The receipt_sig field is an HMAC-SHA256 over the canonical JSON of the receipt body, keyed with DOTINK_SECRET_KEY. Verifiers can confirm the receipt was issued by a dot.ink node that holds the shared secret. Updated in v3 to include lifecycle_state, tool_class, readback_status, break_glass_active, hard_boundary reference, and audit chain fields.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within this server instance

status.description: approved=intent executed and in WAL, blocked=policy violation, pending_review=human approval required

wal_digest.description: Digest of the WAL entry created for this intent (absent if blocked or pending_review)

rule_id.description: Rule that triggered the block or review (absent if approved)

receipt_sig.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest over canonical JSON of the receipt body

lifecycle_state.description: Decision lifecycle position. Added in v3.

tool_class.description: DTM side-effect class of the adapter executing this intent. Added in v3.

readback_status.description: Post-execution readback verification result. mismatch triggers autonomy clamp. Added in v3.

break_glass_active.description: True if a break-glass window was active when this receipt was issued. Verifier flags these. Added in v3.

hard_boundary.description: Reference to the HardBoundaryValidationResult active at receipt time. Added in v3.

schema_version.description: Receipt schema version. 1=original, 2=A+ chain fields, 3=v3 boundary+lifecycle fields.

schema_digest.description: Hex digest of the schema file used to validate this receipt.

audit_chain_seq.description: Position in the tamper-evident audit chain.

prev_digest.description: Digest of the previous audit chain entry.
